REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $5,094.14 RE 36263 FOR TRANSACTION W0520116D005 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO TRT DEFENSE C/O RENEE M PARRA, DOC#191503302, WARRANT #38206298, DATED MAY-11-2020

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TRT DEFENSE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RENEE PARRA PRESIDENT. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT E. PLUS STUDIO, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WAI YEE GOK, OWNER ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER SHERRY CHANG, DAUGHTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRT DEFENSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT E PLUS STUDIO, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
